summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 8 - PDF Manuals & AI Assistant Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working. PDF manual upload section in modal, view/download/delete buttons on ativo detail, AI Assistant showing manual count and tags.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: GET /api/ativos/{id}/manuais returns list of manuals
Backend: POST /api/ativos/{id}/manual uploads PDF successfully
Backend: GET /api/uploads/manuals/{filename} returns PDF without auth (200, application/pdf)
Backend: Non-PDF files rejected with 400 error
Backend: DELETE /api/manuais/{id} works for admin
Backend: POST /api/assistente/chat works
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/ativos returns flat JSON
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/ordens-servico returns flat JSON
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/inspecoes returns flat JSON
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/kpis-historico returns KPI snapshot
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint works
Backend: Ativos list endpoint works
Backend: OS list endpoint works
Backend: Inspecoes list endpoint works
Frontend: Login as admin successful
Frontend: Novo Ativo modal has 'MANUAIS TÉCNICOS (PDF)' section
Frontend: Novo Ativo modal has 'Clique para adicionar PDF' drop zone
Frontend: Ativo detail page shows 'Manuais Técnicos' section
Frontend: Ativo detail page shows 'ENVIAR PDF' button for admin
Frontend: Ativo detail page shows uploaded PDFs with filename, size, date
Frontend: Ativo detail page has view PDF button (eye icon)
Frontend: Ativo detail page has download PDF button
Frontend: Ativo detail page has delete button (admin only, visible on hover)
Frontend: AI Assistant page shows manual count (e.g. '2 manual(is) disponível(is) para a IA')
Frontend: AI Assistant page shows manual tags (e.g. 'BRITADOR - test_upload.pdf')

new_features_verified.feature: PDF Upload Section in Ativo Creation Modal
new_features_verified.description: Modal has 'MANUAIS TÉCNICOS (PDF)' section with dashed border drop zone 'Clique para adicionar PDF'
Manuais Técnicos section shows uploaded PDFs with eye icon (open in new tab), download icon, and delete icon (admin only, visible on hover)
Shows count of available manuals and blue badge tags with format 'ATIVO_TAG - filename.pdf'
GET /api/uploads/manuals/{filename} returns PDF file without requiring authentication

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Test manuals (test_upload.pdf, test_manual.pdf) already uploaded to BRITADOR ativo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF manual features fully implemented and tested. Ativo creation modal has PDF upload section. Ativo detail page shows manuals with view/download/delete buttons. AI Assistant page displays manual count and tags. PDF files accessible without auth at /api/uploads/manuals/{filename}. Power BI endpoints and dashboard regression tests passing. All RBAC working correctly.
